title: Roskilde, Zealand — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Roskilde, Zealand: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Roskilde is a city in Zealand with a population of 52,000. A historic city with a UNESCO-listed cathedral and Viking Ship Museum, famous for its annual music festival.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
